name: pi3pescadores
description: Projeto PI3 Pescadores - Frontend e Backend

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.lint: find backend/src backend/test -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && npm --prefix frontend run build
